languages.text: "Это слова настоящего командующего, Лорд-капитан. Не комиссарская брехня, а истинная опека над солдатами. Как в Уставе. Буду рада сообщить это бойцам!"
"Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"
languages.original_text: "Это слова настоящего командующего, Лорд-капитан. Не комиссарская брехня, а истинная опека над солдатами. Как в Уставе. Буду рада сообщить это бойцам!"

traits.locale_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Code. I'll be glad to tell the men!"
"Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Code. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"
"You know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that sounds closer to how I imagined the Imperium would be back on Zarkov than what I have seen here. Thank you, you help me keep my hope alive."
"Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Code. I'll be glad to tell the men!"
"Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Code. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

languages.text: 「ご存じのように、御{mf|殿|殿}、それは、私がザルコフで帝国を想像していたものよりも、ここでのものに近いですね。ありがとうございます、希望を捨てずにいられるように助けてくれました」
languages.original_text: "You know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that sounds closer to how I imagined the Imperium would be back on Zarkov than what I have seen here. Thank you, you help me keep my hope alive."

languages.text: "Bunlar gerçek bir komutanın sözleri Lord Kaptan. Komiser zırvaları değil, askerler için gerçek bir ihtimam. Tam da El Kitabı'na uygun. Birliklere söylemekten memnuniyet duyacağım!"
languages.original_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

traits.locale_text: "Bunlar gerçek bir komutanın sözleri Lord Kaptan. Komiser zırvaları değil, askerler için gerçek bir ihtimam. Tam da El Kitabı'na uygun. Birliklere söylemekten memnuniyet duyacağım!"

languages.text: “这才是真正的指挥官会说的话，舰长大人。不是政委式的空话，而是对士兵真切的关怀，正如《手册》里所写的一样。我很乐意转告给士兵们！”
languages.original_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

traits.locale_text: “这才是真正的指挥官会说的话，舰长大人。不是政委式的空话，而是对士兵真切的关怀，正如《手册》里所写的一样。我很乐意转告给士兵们！”

languages.text: "Das sind die Worte eines wahren Commanders, Lord Captain. Kein Kommissarsgerede, sondern echte Sorge um die Soldaten. Wie es das Handbuch verlangt. Ich werde die Truppen mit Freude informieren."
languages.original_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

traits.locale_text: "Das sind die Worte eines wahren Commanders, Lord Captain. Kein Kommissarsgerede, sondern echte Sorge um die Soldaten. Wie es das Handbuch verlangt. Ich werde die Truppen mit Freude informieren."

languages.text: « Des propos dignes d'{mf|un|une} véritable {mf|commandant|commandante}, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous vous souciez de vos soldats, pas comme certains. Vous respectez le Manuel. Les troupes seront ravies ! »
languages.original_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

traits.locale_text: « Des propos dignes d'{mf|un|une} véritable {mf|commandant|commandante}, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous vous souciez de vos soldats, pas comme certains. Vous respectez le Manuel. Les troupes seront ravies ! »

languages.text: «Esas son las palabras de un{mf||a} verdader{mf|o|a} comandante, Lord Capitán. No el discurso trillado de los Comisarios, sino una preocupación sincera por sus soldados. Como sacado del manual. ¡Estaré encantada de comunicárselo a las tropas!».
languages.original_text: "Those are the words of a true commander, Lord Captain. Not some Commissar claptrap, but genuine care for the soldiers. Right out of the Handbook. I'll be glad to tell the troops!"

traits.locale_text: «Esas son las palabras de un{mf||a} verdader{mf|o|a} comandante, Lord Capitán. No el discurso trillado de los Comisarios, sino una preocupación sincera por sus soldados. Como sacado del manual. ¡Estaré encantada de comunicárselo a las tropas!».
